award_categories.name: Mid-Rise Residential (5–10M, Completed 2023)
award_categories.description: Recognises mid-rise residential projects completed in 2023 with budgets between $5 million and $10 million, focusing on design quality, liveability, and community impact.

award_categories.name: Excellence in Residential Development (Global)
award_categories.description: Honours outstanding residential developments worldwide, including apartments, townhouses, and multi-family projects.

award_categories.name: Mixed-use Development of the Year – Europe
award_categories.description: Celebrates exemplary mixed-use developments across Europe that successfully integrate residential, commercial, and public realm uses.

award_categories.name: Sustainable Development – Asia Pacific
award_categories.description: Recognises best-in-class sustainable development projects in the Asia Pacific region, with strong performance on carbon, resource efficiency, and community outcomes.

award_categories.name: Global Sustainable Development Award
award_categories.description: Global category for projects that demonstrate exceptional sustainability performance, innovation, and measurable environmental impact reductions.

award_categories.name: Commercial Office Towers (High-rise)
award_categories.description: Awards excellence in high-rise office tower developments with a focus on workplace experience, efficiency, and skyline contribution.

award_categories.name: Retail Destinations – Europe
award_categories.description: Recognises innovative retail centres and mixed retail destinations across Europe.

award_categories.name: Hospitality & Resorts – Asia Pacific
award_categories.description: Rewards outstanding hotels, resorts, and serviced apartments delivering exceptional guest experience and design.

award_categories.name: Industrial & Logistics – North America
award_categories.description: Celebrates excellence in industrial and logistics facilities, including distribution centres and manufacturing plants in North America.

award_categories.name: Urban Infrastructure Project of the Year
award_categories.description: Recognises transformative urban infrastructure projects including transit hubs, bridges, and public realm upgrades.

award_categories.name: Innovation in Design
award_categories.description: Cross-category award for projects demonstrating outstanding innovation in architectural, engineering, or urban design.

award_categories.name: Developer of the Year
award_categories.description: Honours a developer with a strong track record of delivering high-quality, sustainable projects across multiple sectors.

award_categories.name: People's Choice – Residential Projects 2024
award_categories.description: Public vote category for shortlisted residential projects from the 2024 awards cycle.

conference_sessions.title: Opening Plenary: Sustainability Trends in Global Property Development
conference_sessions.description: An overview of the major sustainability trends reshaping property development, from net zero pathways to embodied carbon reduction.

conference_sessions.title: Designing for Urban Sustainability in Mixed-use Districts
conference_sessions.description: Case studies on integrating mobility, green space, and low-carbon design into dense mixed-use districts.

conference_sessions.title: Financing Sustainability: Green Loans and Transition Bonds
conference_sessions.description: Developers, lenders, and rating agencies discuss financing mechanisms that reward strong sustainability performance.

conference_sessions.title: Operational Sustainability in Residential Portfolios
conference_sessions.description: Practical strategies for improving operational sustainability across large residential portfolios, from energy to waste.

conference_sessions.title: AI and Data-driven Design for Property Developers
conference_sessions.description: How data analytics and AI tools are reshaping feasibility analysis and building design.

conference_sessions.title: Risk Management in Large-scale Urban Regeneration
conference_sessions.description: Developers and financiers share lessons from complex, multi-phase regeneration projects.

conference_sessions.title: Day 2 Keynote: The Future of Global Capital Flows
conference_sessions.description: A macro view on capital flows into real estate, and what it means for developers.

conference_sessions.title: Embodied Carbon and Circularity in Construction
conference_sessions.description: Technical deep dive into embodied carbon assessment and circular economy principles supporting sustainability in construction.

conference_sessions.title: Amenity Wars: Competing for Residential Tenants
conference_sessions.description: How developers are rethinking amenities to attract and retain residents.

conference_sessions.title: Placemaking in Mixed-use Districts
conference_sessions.description: Developers share lessons in creating vibrant, enduring mixed-use places.

conference_sessions.title: Community-led Sustainability Initiatives
conference_sessions.description: Showcasing neighbourhood-scale sustainability initiatives led by residents and local stakeholders.

conference_sessions.title: Pre-conference Workshop: Advanced Pro-forma Modelling
conference_sessions.description: Hands-on workshop to improve financial modelling skills for complex developments.

gala_events.name: 2026 Global Property Awards Gala – Chicago
gala_events.description: Black-tie gala dinner celebrating the 2026 Global Property Awards, featuring a seated dinner, live entertainment, and awards presentations.

gala_events.name: 2025 Global Property Awards Gala – London
gala_events.description: An evening gala and seated dinner recognising the 2025 award winners.

gala_events.name: 2024 Global Property Awards Gala – Sydney
gala_events.description: Celebrate the 2024 awards with a waterfront gala and entertainment.

partners.name: Green Horizon Sustainability Consulting
partners.description: Boutique consultancy specialising in net zero roadmaps, ESG strategy, and green building certifications for property developers.

partners.name: EcoMetric Advisors
partners.description: Data-driven sustainability consultants providing carbon modelling, lifecycle assessment, and reporting support.

partners.name: Pacific Blue ESG Partners
partners.description: ESG and sustainability strategy advisors focused on large-scale mixed-use and residential portfolios.

partners.name: CarbonWise Consulting
partners.description: Helps developers measure and reduce embodied and operational carbon across project lifecycles.

partners.name: Skyline Studio Architects
partners.description: Architecture practice specialising in mid-rise residential and mixed-use developments.

partners.name: Nordic Green Design Lab
partners.description: Scandinavian consultancy integrating biophilic design and circularity into large-scale developments.

partners.name: Asia Pacific Low Carbon Solutions
partners.description: Supports developers across Asia Pacific with low-carbon masterplanning and green building rating tools.

partners.name: Atelier Urbain
partners.description: European architecture office known for award-winning mixed-use and cultural projects.

partners.name: Gulf Structural Engineering Group
partners.description: Structural and civil engineering services for high-rise and infrastructure projects.

partners.name: UrbanCore Construction
partners.description: General contractor delivering complex urban infill and adaptive reuse projects.

partners.name: LexProperty Legal
partners.description: Real estate legal specialists with experience in cross-border development deals.

partners.name: Global Capital Advisors
partners.description: Capital advisory firm structuring debt and equity for major development projects worldwide.

partners.name: Blueprint Property Marketing
partners.description: Marketing agency focused on branding and leasing campaigns for new developments.

partners.name: PropTech Nexus
partners.description: Technology integrator delivering smart building and tenant experience platforms.

partners.name: LatAm Urban Futures Lab
partners.description: Think tank and advisory group exploring future trends in Latin American cities.

sponsorship_packages.name: Title Sponsor 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Highest-profile sponsorship with naming rights, premium logo placement on the awards website, 20 gala tickets, and extensive on-site branding.

sponsorship_packages.name: Platinum Partner 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Prominent logo on awards website, category presentation rights, and 10 gala tickets with VIP seating.

sponsorship_packages.name: Gold Partner 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Logo on awards website and selected communications, exhibition space, and 6 gala tickets.

sponsorship_packages.name: Silver Partner 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Logo on sponsor wall and program guide, mention on awards website sponsor page, and 4 gala tickets.

sponsorship_packages.name: Bronze Partner 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Entry-level package including a logo on awards website, listing in the gala program, and 2 gala tickets.

sponsorship_packages.name: Regional Bronze Partner 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Regional visibility package with logo on awards website under regional sponsors, social media mentions, and 2 gala tickets.

sponsorship_packages.name: Networking Supporter 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Branding at networking breaks and logo on on-site signage; includes 1 gala ticket.

sponsorship_packages.name: Digital Supporter 2026
sponsorship_packages.description: Logo in email newsletters and digital materials promoting the awards; no gala tickets included.

nominations.projectOverview: A mid-rise residential community in Singapore featuring extensive rooftop gardens, passive design strategies, and integrated transit access.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: The project achieves a 45% reduction in operational energy use compared to code baseline, incorporates on-site solar PV, and uses greywater recycling for irrigation.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Modular façade panels with integrated shading and sensors dynamically respond to local climate conditions to optimise comfort and energy performance.

nominations.projectOverview: A waterfront mixed-use precinct in Sydney combining offices, residential towers, and public realm upgrades on a former industrial site.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: A district cooling system, recycled materials, and blue-green infrastructure have enabled a projected 60% reduction in carbon emissions over a 50-year lifecycle.
nominations.innovationNarrative: The project piloted a real-time carbon dashboard for tenants and operators, enabling continuous optimisation of building systems.

nominations.projectOverview: A high-rise technology campus in Bengaluru designed around flexible workspaces, shaded courtyards, and integrated transit connections.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: High-performance façades, mixed-mode ventilation, and on-site renewables deliver a targeted 65% reduction in operational carbon emissions.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Digital twins and AI-driven controls continuously monitor performance, identifying optimisation opportunities and maintenance needs.

nominations.projectOverview: An adaptive-reuse retail and cultural hub in Mumbai repurposing a former textile mill into a vibrant public destination.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: Reusing over 70% of the existing structure, the project significantly reduced embodied carbon while introducing passive cooling and green roofs.
nominations.innovationNarrative: A materials passport system tracks components for future reuse, supporting circular economy outcomes.

nominations.projectOverview: A next-generation logistics hub in Seoul featuring electrified fleets, rooftop PV, and high-efficiency cold storage.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: On-site renewables generate 40% of annual energy demand and the scheme is designed to be fully fossil-fuel free in operations.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Advanced automation and digital twin technology minimise energy use while optimising logistics performance.

nominations.projectOverview: A large-scale regeneration of a former port area in Bangkok into a mixed-use district with parks, housing, and cultural amenities.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: Restored wetlands and floodable parks provide climate resilience while enhancing biodiversity along the river corridor.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Community-led design processes and climate scenario modelling informed the masterplan and phasing strategy.

nominations.projectOverview: An integrated coastal defence and mixed-use waterfront project in Jakarta combining flood protection with public spaces and housing.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: Nature-based solutions reduce flood risk while new public transit links cut car dependency for local residents.
nominations.innovationNarrative: The scheme integrates social housing within coastal protection infrastructure, creating new resilient communities.

nominations.projectOverview: A cluster of experimental low-rise buildings in Taipei testing new materials and community energy systems.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: The project operates as a living lab for circular materials, with components designed for disassembly and reuse.
nominations.innovationNarrative: User behaviour is monitored to understand how design nudges can reduce household energy and water use.

nominations.projectOverview: A mid-rise educational and innovation campus in Kuala Lumpur focused on climate technology start-ups.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: The campus integrates passive cooling, extensive shading, and hybrid ventilation to achieve low operational energy use.
nominations.innovationNarrative: An open data platform shares building performance metrics with tenants and researchers.

nominations.projectOverview: Mid-rise residential development completed in 2023 in Chicago.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: High-efficiency building systems, green roofs, and EV-ready parking reduce operational emissions and support low-carbon living.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Flexible apartment layouts allow residents to adapt spaces over time, reducing the need for relocations and fit-out waste.

nominations.projectOverview: A 10-storey residential building overlooking a restored urban lake, featuring family-friendly apartments and shared amenities.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: The project leverages cross-laminated timber for structure, cutting embodied carbon by 35% compared to conventional concrete.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Community co-design sessions informed shared amenity spaces, improving social cohesion and long-term stewardship.

nominations.projectOverview: A canal-side regeneration in Amsterdam combining offices, retail, residential, and cultural uses across several blocks.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: District heating, low-carbon materials, and extensive cycling infrastructure support a low-emissions lifestyle for residents and workers.
nominations.innovationNarrative: An integrated mobility hub consolidates parking, bike storage, and last-mile logistics to free public space for people.

nominations.projectOverview: A flagship net-zero carbon office tower in London targeting global tenants committed to ambitious ESG goals.
nominations.sustainabilityNarrative: All-electric systems, on- and off-site renewables, and high-performance façades enable net zero operational carbon from day one.
nominations.innovationNarrative: Tenant energy budgets are embedded in leases, incentivising efficiency and transparent reporting.

peoples_choice_finalists.description: A compact urban loft development in Copenhagen designed to operate at net zero carbon with extensive rooftop solar and heat recovery ventilation.
An affordable mid-rise residential project in Vancouver with high-performance envelopes and community gardens.
Family-oriented homes in Brisbane adjacent to a restored river corridor and new cycleways.
A hillside residential village in northern Spain combining timber construction with shared mobility services.
A mixed-use eco-district in Singapore showcasing low-carbon buildings, car-free streets, and circular waste systems.
A mixed-use complex in Berlin integrating a mobility hub, offices, and co-living spaces with high sustainability ambitions.
Townhouse-style homes around a restored lake ecosystem with strong community engagement.
A new civic plaza and transport interchange in Rotterdam delivering improved public space and transit access.

ticket_types.name: Early Bird Gala Ticket - Seated Dinner
ticket_types.description: Discounted early bird ticket including access to the full awards ceremony and a three-course seated dinner.

ticket_types.name: Early Bird VIP Ticket - Seated Dinner
ticket_types.description: Early bird VIP ticket with premium seating, welcome champagne, and a three-course seated dinner.

ticket_types.name: Early Bird Networking Ticket
ticket_types.description: Early bird ticket providing access to the cocktail reception and networking areas (no seated dinner).

ticket_types.name: Standard Gala Ticket - Seated Dinner
ticket_types.description: Regular-price gala ticket including access to all program elements and a three-course seated dinner.

ticket_types.name: Corporate Table for 10
ticket_types.description: Reserved table for 10 guests with branding on the table and a three-course seated dinner.

ticket_types.name: Early Bird Gala Ticket - Seated Dinner
ticket_types.description: Early bird ticket for the London gala including a three-course dinner and awards ceremony.

ticket_types.name: Standard Gala Ticket
ticket_types.description: Standard ticket for the London gala including dinner and access to the full awards program.

ticket_types.name: Early Bird Gala Ticket
ticket_types.description: Early bird ticket for the Sydney gala with seated dinner and harbourfront reception.

ticket_types.name: Student Ticket
ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for full-time students including gala access and dinner (student ID required).

winner_projects.description: Comprehensive regeneration of a former industrial canal district into a vibrant mixed-use hub with offices, housing, retail, and cultural venues.
Waterfront mixed-use scheme combining residential towers, offices, and cultural amenities with high environmental performance.
High-rise mixed-use complex integrating retail, offices, and serviced apartments above a major transit interchange.
Low-rise mixed-use village organised around a linear park and active travel corridor.
Award-winning residential development in Singapore that sets a new benchmark for sustainable mid-rise living.
A high-rise residential tower with family-oriented amenities and strong ESG credentials.
An open-air retail destination along the riverfront that prioritises walkability and public space.
A next-generation logistics facility with electrified operations and high sustainability performance.
A low-rise eco resort that integrates local materials, passive design, and community partnerships.
A landmark high-rise office tower with advanced smart building systems and leading ESG performance.
